---
title: "Angela Lulle"
image: avatar.jpg
about:
  template: solana
  image-shape: round
page-layout: full
---

![](banner.jpg){width=100% style="margin-bottom: 30px;"}

Hi, I'm Angela! I'm a PhD candidate in Economics at the [University of Namur](https://www.unamur.be/fr), 
where I work under the supervision of [Catherine Guirkinger](https://catherine.guirkinger.com). 
I am a research fellow of the [F.N.R.S.](https://www.frs-fnrs.be/en) and affiliated with the 
[Center of Research in Development Economics (CRED-DeFiPP)](https://defipp.unamur.be/research-centers/cred).
